diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Indicates active spread beyond the local dental site.

symptoms.symptom_name: No difficulty swallowing saliva/drooling/noisy breathing currently

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reassuring at this time but requires continued close monitoring as it can evolve rapidly.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fluctuant gingival swelling with purulent exudate

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective confirmation of a purulent dental source; clinician-only finding sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Dental abscess with spreading facial cellulitis
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Rapid facial swelling, trismus, and fever together indicate spreading infection requiring urgent in-person assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person maxillofacial/ED assessment with likely IV antibiotics
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Required given rapidly spreading infection with trismus.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Orthopantomogram (OPG) or CT facial bones/soft tissues if deep space spread suspected
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assesses extent of spread and need for surgical drainage.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Oral antibiotics prescribed remotely without in-person review
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would risk missing progression to a deep space infection threatening the airway.
